entry.title: IDC VA79113D0053 (P00069) awarded to HEALTH NET FEDERAL SERVICES, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD THE FY18 VA FEE SCHEDULE (TO BE USED FOR FY19), CANCEL THE DATA ACCESS SERVICES (DAS) GATEWAY REQUIREMENT ESTABLISHED IN MODIFICATION P00047, AND TO CORRECT A TYPO ON PAGE 18 OF VA791-13-D-0053 PCCC / CHOICE CONTRACT CLOSE OUT PLAN ADDENDUM 001. CONTRACT VA791-13-D-0053 WAS AWARDED ON 03 SEPTEMBER 2013 TO HEALTH NET FEDERAL SERVICES, LLC FOR PATIENT-CENTERED COMMUNITY CARE (PCCC) - MEDICAL AND SURGICAL SERVICES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OFFICES OF PHYSICIANS (EXCEPT MENTAL HEALTH SPECIALISTS)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC VA79113D0053 (P00070) awarded to HEALTH NET FEDERAL SERVICES, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ENABLE THE CONTRACTING OFFICER THE AUTHORITY TO WAIVE CERTAIN ADMINISTRATIVE FEE INVOICE REQUIRED DATA ELEMENTS TO EXPEDITE CONTRACT PAYMENTS AND FACILITATE CLOSEOUT.

entry.title: IDC VA79113D0053 (P00071) awarded to HEALTH NET FEDERAL SERVICES, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE THE FULLY EXECUTED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BETWEEN HEALTH NET FEDERAL SERVICES, LLC AND THE UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF VETERANS AFFAIRS FOR THE OPTION YEAR 4 AND ADMINISTRATIVE FEE COMBINED CERTIFIED CLAIM.
